name: MITCHELLS+BUT. LS-,085416
summary: Mitchells & Butlers plc is a British operator of managed pubs, restaurants and bars. The company operates through a variety of brands, including All Bar One, Harvester, Toby Carvery, and O'Neill's, offering a range of dining and drinking experiences. Mitchells & Butlers is headquartered in Birmingham, UK, and its business model is focused on providing hospitality services and experiences
